changes.value: model-loader/src/loader.rs:324 references `resolver.retry_config.max_retries` but ModelResolver has no `retry_config` field. This prevents the entire model-loader crate from compiling tests.
Fix model-loader compile error: no field `retry_config` on ModelResolver

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1 +1 @@
-model-loader/src/loader.rs:324 references `resolver.retry_config.max_retries` but ModelResolver has no `retry_config` field. This prevents the entire model-loader crate from compiling tests.
\ No newline at end of file
